description: The scope of this building permit is limited to the construction of a new 4 unit, multifamily rowhouse, ~386m2 in building area. This building will conform to Part 9, Group C occupancy classified under 9.10.2.1 and reviewed under 9.10.15 as per the submitted documents. The principal residential building is 2 storeys in height, un-sprinklered, with no fire alarm system. This building contains only non-stacked dwelling units.  The walls between the units are constructed as Party walls with a continuous 60 minute FRR and STC rating of 50 / ASTC of 47 per Division B, 9.11.1.1.. This building shall not contain Secondary Suites as the design does not allow for such Use. The storage garage (~140m2) is Group F3 and shall conform to Division B, 9.10.14. or SPV-003. Compliance with the 2019 National Building Code (Alberta Edition), reference standards and related legislation including 9.36 Energy Efficiency is required.
